root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.ending_balance , coalesce( ( select share_stock from sc_mem_m_share_mem where membership_no = sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no ) , 0 ) as share_stock
FROM sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail
WHERE 1=1 /*WHERE*/
